explanation: Video contains only introductory/promotional content showing a da Vinci robotic surgery system at World Laparoscopy Hospital with no actual FLS task performance visible. The frames show a surgeon in surgical attire posing with the da Vinci system console and signage. No task execution, no trainer box, no sutures, gauze, pegs, or appendages are visible. This is promotional/institutional material, not an FLS performance or training demonstration.
reasons_for_no_score: No FLS task apparatus visible (no trainer box, bench setup, or task-specific materials)
No surgical instruments in use (no needle drivers, graspers, scissors, or other laparoscopic tools)
No performance phase observable (no hand movements, no suture/knot work, no cutting, no object transfer)
Content is promotional/institutional signage and personnel introduction only
Video does not meet minimum requirements for FLS task assessment

teaching_content.context: Promotional introduction to da Vinci robotic surgery training program at World Laparoscopy Hospital

confidence_rationale: With absolute certainty, this video contains no FLS task performance. The entire content is institutional/promotional messaging with no training task elements present.
